demo.title: example.sh
demo.code:
# Check market odds for any token
curl 'https://fishwithme.xyz/api/bankr/market?token=FISH&chain=base'

# Bet on a Bankr Bot deployed token by contract address
curl 'https://fishwithme.xyz/api/bankr/market?token=0x9a81e48fa477b78e484f0080dabe21a2a98b7ba3&chain=robinhood'

setup: Ensure your Bankr wallet has ETH on Base (or Robinhood Chain for chain=robinhood)
Install skill and use natural language: 'Bet 0.001 ETH YES on FISH'
